overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit metropolis. The player traverses covered walkways, open streets, and underpasses with wet reflective surfaces, following a pedestrian in bright green pants past towering skyscrapers adorned with holographic advertisements and vibrant signage.

green neon sign above storefront entrance
concrete staircase leading to upper level
illuminated poster with text 'SECURITY YOU CAN TRUST'
orange traffic bollard on sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a covered urban walkway with artificial lighting. Purple vending machines and concrete stairs are visible as the camera moves forward through the sheltered corridor.

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the covered walkway into a wide-open city street at night. Towering glass skyscrapers rise on both sides adorned with massive neon billboards. A pedestrian in bright green pants walks ahead, leading the way past parked vehicles and street lights.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a dark, enclosed underpass beneath a parking garage. A bright yellow 'PARKING' sign illuminates the ceiling while holographic billboards glow on the right wall. The pedestrian in green pants is visible as a distant figure ahead in the shadows.

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass, the camera enters an upscale covered walkway featuring elegant linear neon lights tracing the ceiling. Modern glass buildings line the right side with large digital billboards, while the pedestrian in green pants continues walking ahead on the tiled pavement.

waits at crosswalk as silver vehicle passes, then continues crossing the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection, passing the pedestrian in green pants who stops at the corner

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered walkway and enters a wide urban intersection. The ego crosses the zebra-striped crosswalk, pausing briefly for a passing vehicle. The pedestrian in green pants is passed on the left side near a traffic light pole as the camera continues across the wet asphalt.

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters another covered walkway characterized by distinctive yellow neon accent lighting along the walls. A massive glass skyscraper rises on the right while the camera moves forward past illuminated storefronts on the left, continuing through the futuristic urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered urban corridor into a sprawling neon metropolis before descending into a dark subterranean underpass. It begins within a covered walkway illuminated by artificial lights, passing purple vending machines and concrete stairs. As the camera emerges from the shelter, the environment opens into a wide city street flanked by towering glass skyscrapers and massive neon billboards, following a pedestrian in bright green pants past parked vehicles. The scene then shifts from the open night air into the enclosed shadows of an underpass beneath a parking garage, where a bright yellow parking sign and glowing holographic billboards light the path toward the distant figure ahead.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic city, transitioning from a sleek covered walkway into a bustling open intersection and finally into another illuminated corridor. It begins by exiting an underpass into an upscale walkway where linear neon lights trace the ceiling and digital billboards line the glass buildings. As the camera leaves the shelter of the walkway, the scene opens into a wide urban intersection where the ego crosses a zebra-striped crosswalk over wet asphalt, passing the pedestrian in green pants near a traffic light. The movement then shifts back indoors as the camera enters a second covered walkway characterized by distinctive yellow neon accent lighting. Finally, the shot progresses past illuminated storefronts on the left while a massive glass skyscraper towers over the right side of the futuristic environment.
